edition.dagbeeld: De NAVO-top in Ankara overschaduwt het internationale nieuws, terwijl de begrafenis van Khamenei Iran's machtsstrijd blootlegt. In eigen land houdt de nasleep van de coronapas en een gehackt Foreign Office de gemoederen bezig, en Trump blijft op alle fronten het nieuws domineren.

items.title: Vladimir Putin, or the loneliness of 'Homo Sovieticus'
items.summary: Between denial of reality, a desire for revenge and carefully crafted messaging, the Russian president has tried to position himself as the master of the game. But after more than four years of war in Ukraine, these old tricks inherited from the Soviet past are showing their limitations, and he is losing credibility.

items.title: Pope Leo XIV visits Lampedusa, delivers powerful and symbolic message to 'protect migrants'
items.summary: 13 years after his predecessor, Pope Francis, on Saturday, the pontiff traveled to Lampedusa, a small Italian island that symbolizes the tragedy of migrants who die trying to cross the Mediterranean. For Pope Leo XIV, choosing to go there as Donald Trump's US celebrates its 250th anniversary was a statement in itself.
